headline: Agent persistence emerged as the dominant theme as memory, evaluation, and long-running architecture patterns broke out together.
body: The day's rotation centered on durable agents: agent memory, separated evaluation, and context optimization all led the movers, while long-running agents entered as a new technique. Google Cloud laid out three architectural patterns for production agents built on event-driven dormancy, durable checkpointing, and separated evaluation [6], and two separate Hermes tutorials pushed persistent memory and reusable skill libraries for keeping Claude stateful across sessions [2][3]. Anthropic added enterprise-managed authentication for MCP connectors, moving identity management to the org level [9]. A separate cluster of fundamentals breakouts, including embeddings, Pearson loss, Backpropagation, and Softmax, traces to a Karpathy bigram model walkthrough covering the building blocks of language models [11].

cited_items.title: Hermes Agent Tutorial: How to Setup & Use Open Source AI Agent for Beginners
3 patterns to build long-running AI agents
